scripts.build:exe: bun run build:client && bun build --compile src/index.ts src/workers/buildWorker.ts dist/client/*.js dist/client/*.css --outfile dist/pdploy --minify --sourcemap --bytecode --asset-naming=[name].[ext]
scripts.build:exe:linux-x64: bun run build:client && bun build --compile src/index.ts src/workers/buildWorker.ts dist/client/*.js dist/client/*.css --target bun-linux-x64 --outfile dist/pdploy-linux-x64 --minify --sourcemap --bytecode --asset-naming=[name].[ext]
scripts.build:exe:linux-arm64: bun run build:client && bun build --compile src/index.ts src/workers/buildWorker.ts dist/client/*.js dist/client/*.css --target bun-linux-arm64 --outfile dist/pdploy-linux-arm64 --minify --sourcemap --bytecode --asset-naming=[name].[ext]
